import json


def serialize_events(events: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    encoder = json.JSONEncoder(ensure_ascii=False, separators=(",", ":"))
    return [encoder.encode(event) for event in events]


def export_records(records: list[dict]) -> str:
    encoder = json.JSONEncoder(sort_keys=True)
    return "\n".join(encoder.encode(record) for record in records)


def build_jsonl(items: list[dict]) -> bytes:
    encoder = json.JSONEncoder()
    lines = []
    for item in items:
        lines.append(encoder.encode(item))
    return "\n".join(lines).encode()
